title: chore(deps): update dependency eslint-config-prettier to v6.7.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [eslint-config-prettier](https://togithub.com/prettier/eslint-config-prettier) | devDependencies | minor | [`6.5.0` -> `6.7.0`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/eslint-config-prettier/6.5.0/6.7.0) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>prettier/eslint-config-prettier</summary>

### [`v6.7.0`](https://togithub.com/prettier/eslint-config-prettier/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#Version-670-2019-11-19)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/prettier/eslint-config-prettier/compare/v6.6.0...dcca556e260af985ece4d9af92531fa649268f80)

-   Added: [@​typescript-eslint/space-before-function-paren]. Thanks to Masafumi
    Koba ([@​ybiquitous](https://togithub.com/ybiquitous))!

### [`v6.6.0`](https://togithub.com/prettier/eslint-config-prettier/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#Version-660-2019-11-17)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/prettier/eslint-config-prettier/compare/v6.5.0...v6.6.0)

-   Added: New [eslint-plugin-vue] rules: [vue/dot-location] and
    [vue/keyword-spacing]. Thanks to [@​xcatliu](https://togithub.com/xcatliu)!

</details>
